title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can log in successfully and land in the protected workspace.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed

title: Log in and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can sign in and arrive at the main dashboard workspace.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify protected workspace navigation is available

title: Create an evaluation campaign successfully
description: Verifies an authenticated user can create a campaign with a valid name and date range and see it created afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /evaluations/campaigns/create/
Fill in the campaign name field with a unique campaign name
Select a valid start date
Select a valid end date
Submit the campaign form
Verify a campaign creation confirmation is visible
Verify the new campaign appears in the workspace

title: Create a job vacancy successfully
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can create a new recruitment job vacancy and see it saved successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the job vacancy creation page
Fill in the job title field with a valid job title
Select a department
Fill in the job description field with a valid job description
Submit the job creation form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the new job vacancy is created

title: Assign one campaign to multiple users
description: Verifies an authenticated user can select multiple users, choose a campaign, and complete a bulk assignment successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /evaluations/bulk-assign/
Select multiple users from the user list
Select a campaign from the campaign dropdown
Submit the assignment
Verify assignment completion is visible
Verify the selected users show the campaign assigned

title: Bulk assign a campaign to multiple users
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can select multiple users, complete a bulk assignment, and see the assignments confirmed.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the bulk assignment page
Select one evaluation campaign
Select multiple users
Submit the bulk assignment
Verify the assignment completion confirmation is visible
Verify the selected users are assigned to the campaign

title: Update a candidate status in the pipeline
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open a candidate record in the pipeline and change its status successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /recruitment/pipeline/
Open a candidate record
Change the candidate status
Submit the status update
Verify a status update success notification is visible
Verify the candidate shows the updated status

title: Move a candidate to a new pipeline status
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open a candidate record, change its status, and see a success notification.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the candidate pipeline page
Open a candidate record
Change the candidate status
Verify a success notification is visible
Verify the candidate status has been updated

title: Show the recruitment pipeline workspace
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can reach the candidate pipeline and view candidates in the workspace.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the candidate pipeline page
Verify the candidate pipeline is displayed
Verify candidate records are visible

title: Navigate from the dashboard into protected work areas
description: Verifies an authenticated user can use dashboard navigation to reach recruitment and evaluations sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/
Click the navigation entry for recruitment
Verify the recruitment workspace is displayed
Click the navigation entry for evaluations
Verify the evaluations workspace is displayed

title: Require job vacancy fields before submission
description: Verifies that required job vacancy fields must be completed before a job can be created.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the job vacancy creation page
Submit the job creation form without filling the required fields
Verify required-field validation is visible

title: Prevent bulk assignment when no users are selected
description: Verifies the bulk assign form shows an empty-state or validation feedback when the user tries to assign without selecting any recipients.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /evaluations/bulk-assign/
Select a campaign from the campaign dropdown
Submit the assignment
Verify a user selection validation message is visible
Verify no assignments are completed

title: Validate campaign dates before saving
description: Verifies that a campaign cannot be saved when the selected date range is invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the campaign creation page
Fill in the campaign name field with a valid campaign name
Select an end date earlier than the start date
Submit the campaign form
Verify date-range validation is visible

title: Show an empty state when no bulk assign users are selected
description: Verifies that the bulk assign workspace shows an empty-state or prompt when no users have been selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the bulk assignment page
Leave the user selection empty
Verify an empty state message is visible

title: Prevent campaign creation with missing required details
description: Verifies required campaign fields are validated and the campaign is not created when key details are omitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /evaluations/campaigns/create/
Submit the campaign form
Verify campaign validation errors are visible
Verify the campaign is not created

title: Show an error for invalid login credentials
description: Verifies that entering invalid credentials keeps the user on the login page and shows a login error.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with invalid-user
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the login form
Verify a login error message is visible

title: Prevent campaign creation with an invalid date range
description: Verifies the campaign form rejects a date range where the end date is earlier than the start date.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /evaluations/campaigns/create/
Fill in the campaign name field with a unique campaign name
Select a valid start date
Select an earlier end date than the start date
Submit the campaign form
Verify a date validation error is visible
Verify the campaign is not created
